page_content:
EDUC898 Pre-Candidacy Research (2-4 Credits) Pre-Candidacy Research Repeatable to: 12 credits.

EDUC899 Dissertation of Practice Research (1-6 Credits) Registration required to the extent of 6-9 hours for an Ed.D. Dissertation. Repeatable to: 9 credits.

EMBA630 Data Models and Decisions (3 Credits) To develop probabilistic and statistical concepts, methods and models through examples motivated by real-life data from business and to stress the role that statistics play in the managerial decision making process. Restriction: Must be in Executive MBA program.
